name: ENTERIC CYST
definition: cyst lined by gastrointestinal mucosa without bowel wall

demographics.Etiology: migration of small bowel / colonic diverticulum into mesentery / mesocolon
demographics.Path: unilocular thin smooth-walled cyst with serous contents lined by enteric epithelium +

dominant_finding: hypoechoic cystic mass, occasionally with septations
discriminating_features: hypoechoic cystic mass, occasionally with septations

US: hypoechoic cystic mass, occasionally with septations
